# I regret to inform  you…

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Tuesday is hereby canceled. We’re calling it Friday instead!

Well, Black Friday, to be specific. 🖤🎁

Black Friday sale unlocked! Save 70% on MonsterInsights! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..I8Svyye0JBpEZfdL8vrHdxPydg6shREecJym_HxALiU )

Whichever day of the week it is, our biggest Black Friday sale
ever won’t last forever!

👉 Get 70% off MonsterInsights Pro now! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..I8Svyye0JBpEZfdL8vrHdxPydg6shREecJym_HxALiU )

Going Pro now is an investment in your success in 2025.
Understanding your users makes marketing so much more effective!

Just a few of the
features you’ll get to help you grow are:

* Media tracking
* Author tracking
* Campaign tracking
* Form submission tracking
* Conversations AI (Chat with your Analytics data)
* PPC ad tracking
* And more!
And don’t forget the free year of UserFeedback! Get
the user feedback you need to truly understand your visitors.

Get Started Now for 70% Off 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..I8Svyye0JBpEZfdL8vrHdxPydg6shREecJym_HxALiU )
Talk soon,
Jolissa Skow
